pageProps.content:
["$r",null,null,{"children":[["$r","p",null,{"children":"此仓库为基于 Debian 的发行版提供了官方打包的 FireFox 浏览器，支持 amd64、arm64 架构。"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["目前，Debian 稳定版只包含了长期支持版本 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"firefox-esr"}],"，而 Ubuntu 的 FireFox 切换到了 Snap 包。有需要的用户可使用本仓库提供的 APT 源。"]}],"
",["$r","h2",null,{"id":"使用方法","children":"使用方法"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["下面的内容修改自 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"https://support.mozilla.org/en-US/kb/install-firefox-linux#w_install-firefox-deb-package-for-debian-based-distributions","rel":"nofollow","children":"Install Firefox on Linux"}],"。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"首先导入和检查 keyring："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-0","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"然后添加 APT 源："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[{"title":"系统架构","items":[["amd64",{"arch":"amd64"}],["arm64",{"arch":"arm64"}]]}],"templateId":"template-1","filepath":"/etc/apt/sources.list.d/mozilla.list","enableQuickSetup":true}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"如有需要，配置 APT 优先级："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-2","filepath":"/etc/apt/preferences.d/mozilla","enableQuickSetup":true}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"更新 APT 缓存并安装："}],"
",["$r","SyntaxHighlight",null,{"code":"sudo apt update && sudo apt install firefox
sudo apt install firefox-l10n-zh-cn # 可选：中文语言包","language":"bash"}]]}]

compiledTemplates.template-0: {code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b(t.v(t.f("sudo",c,p,0)));t.b("install -d -m 0755 /etc/apt/keyrings");t.b("\n" + i);t.b("wget -q https://packages.mozilla.org/apt/repo-signing-key.gpg -O- | ");t.b(t.v(t.f("sudo",c,p,0)));t.b("tee /etc/apt/keyrings/packages.mozilla.org.asc > /dev/null");t.b("\n" + i);t.b("gpg -n -q --import --import-options import-show /etc/apt/keyrings/packages.mozilla.org.asc | awk '/pub/{getline; gsub(/^ +| +$/,\"\"); if($0 == \"35BAA0B33E9EB396F59CA838C0BA5CE6DC6315A3\") print \"\\nThe key fingerprint matches (\"$0\").\\n\"; else print \"\\nVerification failed: the fingerprint (\"$0\") does not match the expected one.\\n\"}'");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
compiledTemplates.template-1: {code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("deb [arch=");t.b(t.v(t.f("arch",c,p,0)));t.b(" signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/packages.mozilla.org.asc] ");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/apt mozilla main");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
compiledTemplates.template-2: {code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("Package: *");t.b("\n" + i);t.b("Pin: release a=mozilla");t.b("\n" + i);t.b("Pin-Priority: 1000");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
